title: Meeting Notes to Action Items Fast
description: 20 prompts for project managers to instantly transform messy meeting notes into clean summaries, assigned action items, and follow-up messages.
gumroad_description:
Your meeting ended 20 minutes ago and you still have no idea who owns what.

These 25 prompts fix that in under two minutes — paste your raw notes, get a clean summary, assigned action items, and a ready-to-send follow-up message.

Who this is for

  • Project managers running 5+ meetings a week who lose hours to cleanup and follow-up
  • Team leads who need accountability without micromanaging every task
  • Consultants and freelancers who bill by the hour and can't afford note-taking overhead

What's inside

  • Prompts that extract owners, deadlines, and blockers from even the messiest notes
  • Stakeholder-ready summary templates your team will actually read
  • Follow-up message prompts calibrated for Slack, email, and async teams
  • Markdown and JSON formats so it drops into any workflow without reformatting
  • Works instantly with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini — no setup required

Stop rewriting notes by hand. Download and use it today.
